# Automatic Samples Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize 24/7 automatic HR and PPI sample protobuf-to-model mapping before KMP migration. They focus on deterministic model conversion: sample dates/times, trigger enums, HR arrays, PPI delta decompression, PPI error-estimate delta decompression, and status-bit mapping. `ActivitySummaryCommonPolicyTest.kt` provides executable shared common policy coverage for trigger mapping, HR array preservation, PPI delta decompression, error-estimate delta decompression, status-bit mapping, the common time-formatting decision point, and the combined `sdk/activity-samples/activity-summary-readiness.json` behavior-family gate. PSFTP directory listing and file transport behavior are covered in file utility and runtime fake-transport plans.
